name: apex-sync-pull
description: Apex Revenue — apex-sync-pull. Uses the repo's shared.js pattern with apexrevenue/config secret for DATABASE_URL.
notes: Build: cp shared.js into this dir, npm install, zip -r ../bundle.zip . && deploy with VPC config (subnet-03091d5ceffef6b70, subnet-068539aeed7d31ad6, sg-0e1c907af12faa7f2) and role ApexRevenue-Lambda-Role.
